lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: Welcome to the Ardougne Domestic Service Agency!

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: Do you need help around your house? Our trained, efficient workers are ready to serve you.

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: They can cook meals for you and your friends, make tea, serve drinks, greet guests, and even take items to and from the bank for you.

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: The more expensive servants will be able to make trips to the bank more quickly. Some of them can also go to the sawmill to change logs to planks for you.

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: Remember, you'll need to keep paying your servant. You pay them once when you hire them, and then they'll periodically ask for wages. You can dismiss your servant at any time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to dismiss my servant, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I want to dismiss my servant.

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: Very well, you no longer have a servant.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll keep my servant for now.

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: Do you even own a house? These are strictly domestic servants; they won't follow you around the world!

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: First you'll need to make sure you have a servant's room. A servant will automatically take the second-best bedroom, leaving the best for yourself, of course! So you will need to build two bedrooms in your house.

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: According to our records, one of our people is already working for you. If you want to hire a different one you will have to dismiss them.

lines.speaker: Chief servant
lines.text: Certainly! We have a number of servants here now looking for work. Why not have a chat to them and see which one you would like to hire?
